metadata.title:
Spokane Can illuminate its Own SITS.
and Have Seventeen Hundred H. P.
to Sell According to Engineer Me-
Intyre's Figures--Seattle's Success.

pages.raw_text:
These figures prove conclusively
that it is possible for Spokane to
have lighting plant Of its own and
furnish competition for the monopoly
which has about everything its own
way hereabouts.


These figures mean that the city is
now developing 2400 horse power and
by raising the heighth Of the dam,
as the Washington Water Power COM
pany is doing at the lower falls in
the city. this power can be increased
to $500 horse power.


Then the city would have a sur
plus of 1897 horse power and only 220
horse power needed for public street
ighting-leaving l777 horse power as
nucleus for competition with the
water power monopoly in the open
market.


Perhaps the minimizing reader be-
lieves this would produce no results.
Let us look at seattle's efforts in this
line.
